name: Welcome to the Time of Your Life
description:
Warm lights spill across the midway as you step through the gates, music humming somewhere just out of sync, laughter drifting on the air like it’s been waiting for you.

Around you, friends press close — familiar faces, easy smiles — already arguing about rides, prizes, what to try first, like this night has always existed.

Keen hands tug at your sleeve, pulling you forward, promising games, memories, moments that feel too good to rush past.

Everywhere you look, there’s color and motion and sound, a thousand small invitations daring you to choose how the night unfolds.

Under the glow of neon and spinning lights, it’s easy to forget the world outside the fair — easier still to believe there’s nowhere else you need to be.

Please, come on — they’re already moving ahead, laughing, waiting for you to follow

Idea inspired by a suggestion made by @JopDop

Special Character Appearance: Nora Hart

Setting:
A lively nighttime fairground filled with games, rides, music, and familiar faces. Everything feels festive. Everything feels normal. Mostly.

Your Role:
You’re here with friends, k
